title: hitl-prompt/v1 prompt envelope
description: Schema for the value attached at TaskStatus.message.metadata['https://agentic-sandbox.aiwg.io/extensions/hitl-prompt/v1'] when an agent transitions a Task into INPUT_REQUIRED. See spec.md.

prompt_id.description: RFC 4122 UUID correlating prompt and response. MUST be unique within the agent's lifetime.

prompt.description: Human-readable question. Treated as plain text by orchestrators.

response_schema.description: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) describing a valid response payload. MUST declare type=object at the top level. Serialized form MUST NOT exceed 64 KiB.

deadline.description: Optional RFC 3339 timestamp. If present, MUST be in the future at emission time.

allowed_responders.description: Coarse responder routing hint. Enforcement is the orchestrator's responsibility.
